description_zh: Anthropic 出品的顶级 AI 助手，以安全性、长上下文和强推理能力著称，是代码、分析与写作的首选模型
description_en: Anthropic's top AI assistant, known for safety, long context and strong reasoning. First choice for code, analysis and writing

description_zh: OpenAI 出品的全球最广泛使用的 AI 模型，GPT-5 支持文字、图像、语音多模态，最成熟的通用 AI 平台
description_en: OpenAI's most widely used AI model. GPT-5 supports text, image, voice multimodal. The most mature general AI platform

description_zh: Google 出品的多模态大模型，Gemini 3 Pro 在推理和长上下文处理上表现卓越，提供慷慨免费额度
description_en: Google's multimodal LLM. Gemini 3 Pro excels at reasoning and long context, with generous free tier

description_zh: 国产顶级开源模型，DeepSeek V3 以极低成本提供接近顶尖的推理能力，MoE 架构高效节能
description_en: Top Chinese open-source model. DeepSeek V3 delivers near-frontier reasoning at minimal cost with efficient MoE architecture

description_zh: 月之暗面出品，以超长上下文处理和中文理解见长，Kimi K2.5 推理任务达国际顶尖
description_en: By Moonshot AI, excels at ultra-long context and Chinese understanding. Kimi K2.5 achieves top-tier reasoning

description_zh: Meta 出品的顶级开源大模型，Llama 4 支持多模态与超长上下文，可免费本地部署
description_en: Meta's top open-source LLM. Llama 4 supports multimodal and ultra-long context, free local deployment

description_zh: xAI 出品，能实时获取 X（Twitter）信息，擅长时事分析与开放对话
description_en: By xAI, can access real-time X (Twitter) info, excels at current events analysis and open conversation

description_zh: 清华技术支持的国产大模型，GLM-5 在中文理解、代码生成和工具调用方面表现出色
description_en: Chinese LLM backed by Tsinghua. GLM-5 excels at Chinese understanding, code generation and tool calling

description_zh: 阿里云通义千问系列，Qwen3.5 多语言、代码和推理综合能力强，多版本免费
description_en: Alibaba Cloud's Tongyi Qwen series. Qwen3.5 strong in multilingual, code and reasoning, many free versions

description_zh: 字节跳动出品，以极低价格和稳定性能著称，适合高并发大规模部署
description_en: By ByteDance, known for extremely low pricing and stable performance, ideal for high-concurrency deployment

description_zh: 国产顶级大模型，MiniMax M2.7 支持100万 token 超长上下文，长文档和多轮对话优秀
description_en: Top Chinese LLM. MiniMax M2.7 supports 1M token ultra-long context, excels at long documents and multi-turn dialogue

description_zh: 小米推出的开源大模型，MiMo-V2 推理能力超越同量级竞品，轻量高效
description_en: Xiaomi's open-source LLM. MiMo-V2 outperforms peers in reasoning, lightweight and efficient

description_zh: 法国 AI 公司出品，Mistral 系列以高性价比和开源友好著称，Small 4 适合轻量部署
description_en: French AI company, Mistral series known for cost-efficiency and open-source friendliness
